bird.name: 侏鶴鴕
bird.summary: 侏鹤鸵（学名：Casuarius bennetti），是鹤鸵目鹤鸵科的一种鸟类。 特征 侏鹤鸵体重34999.99克，翼长216.8毫米，嘴峰长73.8毫米，喙宽度10.8毫米，喙厚度16.1毫米，跗蹠长260毫米，尾长318.8毫米。侏鹤鸵在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在密集的高…

relations.subject: 侏鶴鴕
relations.evidence: thumb|right|upright|Egg of Dwarf Cassowary thumb|right|200px|Chicks The dwarf cassowary has been classified as Near Threatened by the IUCN from 2004 to 2013 due to pressure by habitat loss, habitat degradation, being hunted for food, and often being kept in captivity
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 侏鶴鴕
relations.evidence: However, the species was downgraded to Least Concern in 2015, as current populations appear to be stable (although population trends remain generally unknown) and there is substantially less hunting pressure than in the past
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
